color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
绿色：服务器本地算力 / 本地服务
Java、Python、规则拆题、公式校验、文件读写

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
紫色：服务器本地 GPU 算力
MinerU: 物理 GPU0，容器内 CUDA 0
aux-qwen3-32b-fp8 / vLLM: 物理 GPU1

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
黄色：外部大模型 API
DeepSeek / DashScope / OpenAI-compatible

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
蓝色：混合路由
边界确认外部优先；其它低风险结构任务本地优先

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 灰色：持久化 / 可选基础设施

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
浏览器 / 平台调用方
local-platform 或公司平台

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
docker-compose.server.yml
question-engine 单容器
HTTP :80/:5173 -> nginx :8080 -> Java :8018
Python worker :8000 内部访问

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Java 主后端
Spring Boot 3.3.5 / Java 17
能力 API、任务状态、文件元数据、状态同步

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Python worker
FastAPI
OCR / AI 路由 / LaTeX / 导出执行

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
server-data /data
OCR job、输出、Java 文件副本
默认 H2 文件库

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
docker-compose.local.yml
MySQL / Redis / MinIO
本地或联调可选依赖，不是 OCR 算力

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Java domain 表
importTasks、importQuestions、images、storageFiles、aiJobs

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
worker 兼容 JSON store
jobs/*.json + .bak

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
upload 文件上传
保存试卷/答案原文件
创建 OCR job

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
preprocess 预处理
识别扩展名，Markdown 直读或 DOC 转 DOCX

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ocr-provider OCR 引擎
OCR_FLOW_PROVIDER=mineru

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
常驻 MinerU API + CLI 调用
mineru-api :8002，CLI 追加 --api-url
GPU0 复用模型，避免每任务重新初始化

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
collect-outputs 收集产物
Markdown、content_list、页码、图片 assets

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
paper-structure-contract
总题数、大题声明、每段题号范围
先过滤卷头和说明区编号

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
local-boundary-detect 本地边界候选
大题、题号、小问、选项、题图候选

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
anchor candidate scoring
数字锚点先评分
合法范围、正文区、连续性和题干语义

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
boundaryConfidence
本地边界是否高置信？

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
跳过 llm-boundary-refine
splitter.source=local-boundary

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
llm-boundary-refine AI 边界确认
默认外部满血模型
只确认边界，不生成题干正文

div.style: color: rgb(88, 28, 135) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
服务器本地小模型
LOCAL_LLM_BASE_URL
aux-qwen3-32b-fp8
小问结构、标准化等低风险任务优先

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
外部满血模型
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY / DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
deepseek-v4-pro 等
高风险、失败兜底、复杂解析

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
边界失败兜底
超时、JSON/schema 错误、证据回溯失败 -> 本地候选

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
question-structure-build 结构构建
按 OCR 原文 offset 切片生成题目

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
sub-question-split 小问拆解
写入 subQuestions / children

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
visual-repair 视觉修复
题目 crop、横线检测
可选 Pix2Text 二次 OCR

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
structure-validate 结构校验
选项、小问、题图、空位、证据回溯

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
math-normalize 公式校验
本地 LaTeX 归一化和风险标记

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
first-return auto-standardize
OCR_AUTO_STANDARDIZE_MODE=risky
并发低置信题标准化，不创建 Java AI job

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
自动标准化硬校验
渲染、选项、题图、小问和严重风险
失败保留原题

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ai-enrich / 人工触发 AI
需要语义修复、标准化、答案解析或元数据？

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
本地优先 AI 标准化
规则修复 + 本地 LLM 候选
候选需通过安全闸门

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
外部模型 AI 解析 / 高风险补全
答案、解析、知识点、复杂推理

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
候选安全闸门
renderValidation、applyBlocked、严重风险检查

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OCR outputs
questions、splitter、boundaryConfidence、mathValidation、autoSemanticRepair、llmMetrics

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Java 同步快照
导入题、题图、OCR 状态、失败原因

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PaperLayoutCapability
OCR_PAPER_LAYOUT_ENABLED 控制
只读父题定位，不参与拆题

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
layout-region-bind
middle bbox + sourceEvidence
嵌套图片路径、短选项标签防串题

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
layout fallback/warnings
只命中小标签、极小框或缺题图时降级
不影响题目识别稳定性

div.style: color: rgb(20, 83, 45) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OCR 工作台
轮询任务、人工校验、题图维护、入库

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
重新 OCR 扫描
Java /rescan 重投原始 OCR job
已有题目和编辑内容不覆盖

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AI 解析全部
前端批处理单题/小问解析
默认补缺失，进度 n/m
